AI/ML · Data · Support Engineering

Zachary Ryan Lopez

Design systems, clean builds, rigorous thinking. I blend data operations, diagnostics, and product-minded craft.

View Work Download Résumé

01 About

I’m an AI/ML data operations specialist with 7+ years improving annotation quality and UX for high-volume pipelines. I partner with ML and Product to reduce error classes, tune taxonomies, and accelerate iteration through dashboards and QA rigor.

  • Base: Austin, TX
  • Focus: AI/ML data quality, diagnostics, and practical web builds
  • Interests: cinematography, performance, and design systems

0% accuracy lift (targeted domains)

03 Skills

Annotation QAGuideline AuthoringIAATaxonomy Governance Sampling/QC PlansExperiment DesignFriction Analysis TableauJira/ConfluenceJSON/CSVExcelBasic SQL NLP/NLU/ASRPrompt EvaluationData QualityLocalization Nuance UX EvaluationPrivacy/PIIPythonCloudflare Pages HTML/CSS/JSDesign Systems

04 Experience

  1. Apple — Data Operations Analyst · Sep 2021–Jun 2024
    Reviewed high-volume assistant interactions with linguistic tagging and QA, driving a 12% accuracy lift across targeted domains; refined prompts, intents, and fallbacks across en_US, en_CA, en_UK; built dashboards to monitor throughput, error classes, and taxonomy drift.
  2. Apple — Technical Expert · Mar 2019–Sep 2021
    Diagnosed recurring faults via log analysis; reduced repeat visits by ~20% and mentored teammates with playbooks that improved first-time resolution and triage speed.
  3. Apple — Business Dev (Apple Pay) · Jan 2021–Jun 2021
    Prospected e-merchants and supported SDK/API onboarding and testing; improved conversion with optimized integration paths and checkout messaging.
  4. Apple — iOS Technical Support Advisor · Mar 2020–Jan 2021
    Achieved 90%+ same-call resolution across 2,000+ cases with minimal escalations using remote diagnostics and precise documentation.
  5. Leadership · Starbucks & Target
    Shift Lead and Front-End Supervisor — accelerated service and reduced queue times via training and dynamic lane management.
